current_entry.description: Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

change_history.old_value: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files.

initial_entry.name: Vault Intelligence
initial_entry.author: cybaea
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Research your vault with an AI agent powered by Google Gemini, discover related notes through semantic search, and analyze specific documents with contextual note referencing.

current_entry.name: Vault Intelligence
current_entry.author: cybaea
current_entry.description: Maintain your vault as a self-updating knowledge system by running AI agents that find gaps, audit and unify tags, and retrieve context based on similarity and explicit links via Graph RAG - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

initial_entry.name: Vault Link
initial_entry.description: Link files and folders between vaults so they share the same content on disk, with per-file exclude rules for things you want to keep vault-specific (e.g. themes). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
